name: Get-TimeZone

options.name: -Id
options.description: Specifies, as a string array, the ID or IDs of the time zones that this cmdlet gets.

options.name: -ListAvailable
options.description: Indicates that this cmdlet gets all available time zones.

options.name: -Name
options.description: Specifies, as a string array, the name or names of the time zones that this cmdlet gets.

description: Gets the current time zone or a list of available time zones.
